semantic.role: CLI command adapter for starting the ArchSpine Model Context Protocol (MCP) server.
responsibilities: Parses command-line arguments for the 'mcp' subcommand.
Instantiates and starts the ArchSpineMCPServer when the 'start' subcommand is invoked.
Provides a structured interface (ExecuteMcpCommandOptions) for MCP command execution options.
Delegates server lifecycle management to the dedicated MCP server implementation in the infrastructure layer.
outOfScope: Implementing MCP server logic (handled by infra/mcp/server)
Complex command-line argument validation beyond basic subcommand routing
invariants: Must remain a thin adapter; all MCP server logic belongs in the infrastructure layer.
Must not absorb business logic, pipeline, or persistence responsibilities.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Separate CLI command routing from server implementation to keep CLI thin and reusable.
